items.title: 100-days-of-ai
items.summary: Take the 100 Days of AI challenge - learn one AI concept a day, from machine learning basics to AI agents in production, in 100 days.
items.summary_cn: 参加100天的人工智能挑战-在100天内每天学习一个人工智能概念，从机器学习基础知识到生产中的人工智能代理。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Zer0Fit
items.summary: Zero-shot forecasting, tabular classification, and regression via MCP — exposes Google TimesFM 2.5 and TabFM v1.0.0 to AI assistants. Just attach a CSV and describe what you want to predict.
items.summary_cn: 零点预测、表格分类和通过MCP进行回归—将Google TimesFM 2.5和TabFM v1.0.0暴露给AI助手。只需附上CSV文件并描述您想要预测的内容。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities
items.title_cn: 法学硕士的元认知：基础、进步和机遇
items.summary: Metacognition is a foundational component of intelligence critical to effective learning, problem solving, decision-making, communication, and more. In recent years, it has become increasingly recognized as a cornerstone of capable, transparent AI systems. Yet while LLMs have made significant progre...
items.summary_cn: 元认知是智力的基本组成部分，对有效学习、解决问题、决策、沟通等至关重要。近年来，它越来越被认为是功能强大、透明的人工智能系统的基石。然而，虽然LLM取得了重大进展...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks
items.title_cn: 归纳推理任务中变压器的不变学习动力学
items.summary: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. While previous works on Transformer learning dynamics have so far been mostly tied to specific tasks, we study a generalized class of inductive tasks that unifies several synt...
items.summary_cn: 我们提出了一个理论框架来解释Transformer语言模型中归纳推理能力的出现。虽然迄今为止关于变压器学习动力学的先前工作主要与特定任务有关，但我们研究了一类归纳任务，该类归纳任务统一了...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: A Minimalist Retargeting-Guided Reinforcement Learning Recipe for Dexterous Manipulation
items.title_cn: 针对灵巧操纵的极简主义重定向引导式强化学习方法
items.summary: Recent work in humanoid whole-body control has found success with a simple recipe: retarget human motion to robot kinematic references, then train policies via reinforcement learning (RL) to track them. But how does this recipe transfer to dexterous manipulation? The answer is not obvious, as manipu...
items.summary_cn: 最近在人形全身控制方面的工作通过一个简单的配方取得了成功：将人体运动重新定位到机器人运动学参考，然后通过强化学习（ RL ）训练策略来跟踪它们。但这个配方是如何转化为灵巧的操纵的？答案并不明显，因为manipu...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
items.title_cn: 已经很富有，已经很成功，为什么最后一波科技赢家又在苦苦挣扎
items.summary: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.
items.summary_cn: 他们又卷起袖子，似乎出于害怕错过人工智能的决定性时刻，以及可能无法抗拒的赚更多钱的诱惑--可能更多。
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
items.title_cn: 优步的酒店、机器人出租车产品主管，以及为什么优步不想成为“一切为了所有人”
items.summary: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.
items.summary_cn: 优步首席产品官Sachin Kansal向TechCrunch介绍了公司的金融服务抱负、与Waymo日益复杂的关系、新的AV Labs数据运营，以及人工智能如何开始以乘客和司机实际注意到的方式出现。
items.comment: 监管落地对行业是双刃剑，合规成本飙升，小玩家可能被挤出市场。

items.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
items.title_cn: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse融资4.39亿美元，估值飙升超过20亿美元
items.summary: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.
items.summary_cn: 借助这笔资金，该公司的目标是扩大其世界模式产品，并接触到不同地区的客户。
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。
